content_body: Our family needed some mountain time and this was the perfect place. We enjoyed roasting hot dogs, making s'mores, and sitting around the fire. The view was amazing! Our grandson loved being here and enjoying the outdoors. If you love to hike, there are a lot of hiking trails to enjoy. We enjoyed Fall Branch Falls and Aska Trails! Thank you for sharing your beautiful home. We loved the no-stress time we had.
title: The Perfect Place for Some Mountain Time
